title: Omnilib
description: A framework for enhanced UI elements and customization
body:
_**Omnilib has been deprecated. Any mods that currently use it are not affected and can continue to do so, however this mod or the wiki will never be updated again.**_

## Getting Started If a mod requires Omnilib, follow these steps to install it: 1. Download the correct version of the mod from this page. 2. Place the downloaded JAR file in your Minecraft `mods` folder. 3. Launch Minecraft! **Note:** If you are on Fabric, Fabric API is required. If you are on (Neo)Forge, Sinytra Connector & Forgified Fabric API are required. ## Support For help or feedback, join the community on Discord. ## For Developers If you are a developer looking to use Omnilib in your mod, check out the [wiki](https://github.com/dooji2/omnilib/wiki). **Official Downloads**: - CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/omnilib - GitHub: https://github.com/dooji2/omnilib - Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/omnilib
